caption: A man with a distinct, tall, silver-grey pointed hairstyle and glasses sits in a studio setting. He is wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and a red and white patterned bowtie, with large black headphones over his ears. He is positioned behind a professional black microphone. The background consists of a wall covered in numerous small, framed photographs and some clothing items. An on-screen logo featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears in the lower left and center of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains mostly stationary, looking slightly to the left with a serious expression. His posture stays consistent, with his arms crossed across his chest, and there is very little movement in his facial expression or position, maintaining a steady shot of him during the recording session.
